questions.prompt: Are galley restraints and stowage areas serviceable and secure?
questions.expectedEvidence: Inspector observation and required exception comment

questions.prompt: Are lavatory safety equipment and placards present and serviceable?
questions.expectedEvidence: Inspector observation and required exception comment

questions.prompt: Are passenger seats, belts, and adjacent fittings serviceable?
questions.regulatoryReference: Configured Cabin Inspection reference - PAX SEAT
questions.expectedEvidence: Inspector observation and required exception comment

questions.prompt: Is the PBE installed, serviceable, accessible, and in compliance with configured cabin emergency equipment requirements?
questions.regulatoryReference: Configured Cabin Inspection reference - EM EQ / PBE
questions.expectedEvidence: PBE serviceability record and cabin position confirmation

questions.prompt: Are cabin information displays and crew seats serviceable?
questions.regulatoryReference: Configured Cabin Inspection reference - VID+CREW SEAT
questions.expectedEvidence: Inspector observation and required exception comment

questions.prompt: Are cabin general condition and emergency exits satisfactory?
questions.regulatoryReference: Configured Cabin Inspection reference - COCKPIT+CAB GEN COND+EXITS
questions.expectedEvidence: Inspector observation and required exception comment
